tagline: Books entries, reconciles and closes the month — segregation of duties enforced, a controller signs the close.
problem: Bookkeeping and the monthly close are labour-heavy and control-sensitive; an autonomous mistake is a misstated financial statement and broken internal control.
outcome: Standard entries booked straight-through with segregation of duties; an immutable balanced ledger; non-standard revenue and the period-close lock escalated to a controller.

steps.does: Ingest transactions from the bank feed and revenue system
Draft balanced journal entries (≤ materiality) into an append-only ledger
Enforce SoD, ASC 606 revenue, cutoff and reconciliation; flag non-standard items
A controller signs off non-standard entries, non-standard revenue and the period-close lock
Post approved entries and reconcile accounts
Produce close package and variance / flux analysis for review
